steps.title: Determine each segment type's contribution
steps.content: With $x$ segments of 2 minutes each, we get $2x$ minutes. With $y$ segments of 5 minutes each, we get $5y$ minutes.

steps.title: Write the total equation
steps.content:
The sum of all segments equals the 84-minute video:
$$2x + 5y = 84$$
That confirms D is correct.
